title: Necromancer Sword
description: "It contains a powerful creature - the Necromancer. The sword has power, but in return it takes possession of the mind of the one who wields the weapon"
body:
The sword doesn't belong to any universe of games or anything like that, no, 
it's my author's model, I made it referring to my imagination, and also an 
interesting fact: it's my first model in BlockBench!
**_Recommended for full work, it is recommended to download Optifine (Forge) or CITresewn (Fabric)_**
(P.S. It happened by accident, but the coloring is somewhat similar to the Manic mod, 
I found out about this mod after I made the model, I don't know how it turned out XD)
